__MAP[v]or v end return(function(U,H,V,k,W,j,M,L,i,Y,D,a,o,v,C,y,z,T,d,I,N,q,l,Q)Q,i,D,I,C,z,l,q,T,o,y,Y,N,d,a,v,L=function(U,F)local H=o(F)local V=function(V,k,W,j,M,y,a)return q(U,{V,k,W;j;M;y,a},F,H)end return V end,function(U,F)local H=o(F)local V=function(V,k,W,j,M,y)return q(U,{V;k;W,j,M;y},F,H)end return V end,function(U,F)local H=o(F)local V=function(V,k,W)return q(U,{V;k,W},F,H)end return V end,function(U,F)local H=o(F)local V=function(V,k,W,j,M)return q(U,{V;k;W;j,M},F,H)end return V end,function(U,F)local H=o(F)local V=function(...)return q(U,{...},F,H)end return V end,function(U,F)local H=o(F)local V=function(V,k,W,j)return q(U,{V,k,W;j},F,H)end return V end,function(U,F)local H=o(F)local V=function(V,k)return q(U,{V;k},F,H)end return V end,function(q,V,k,W)local L0={}local q0,cB,WB,F0,u,tB,hB,X,pB,PB,EB,zB,KB,r,Y0,lB,a0,dB,xB,ZB,fB,GB,w,MB,W0,K,BB,Y,eB,H0,f,CB,y0,o0,c,n,jB,bB,FB,R,qB,iB,a,S,h,B,AB,A,o,LB,J,oB,RB,vB,wB,QB,nB,JB,x,DB,U0,V0,aB,t,e,C,g,YB,UB,b,gB,rB,O,IB,k0,uB,P,VB,M,Z,E,m,sB,HB,d,M0,XB,yB,kB,s,p,mB,SB,N0,d0,OB,TB,j0,NB,G
